message:
refactor: Extract workers init/discover commands to dedicated module

Continues the commands module modularization by moving worker
initialization and discovery commands to workers_init.rs:

**Extracted to workers_init.rs:**
- workers_init(): Interactive wizard for adding new remote workers
  - 5-step guided setup: hostname, username, SSH key, capabilities, confirm
  - SSH connectivity testing
  - Auto-generates worker ID
  - Writes to workers.toml

- workers_discover(): Auto-discovery of potential workers
  - Scans SSH config (~/.ssh/config) for configured hosts
  - Tests SSH connectivity in parallel
  - Probes remote capabilities (OS, arch, compilers)
  - Offers to add discovered workers

**Changes to mod.rs:**
- Adds `mod workers_init;` declaration
- Re-exports workers_init and workers_discover for backward compatibility

This extraction follows the established pattern of moving command
implementations to dedicated modules while keeping mod.rs as a
lightweight routing/re-export layer.

Part of the ongoing bd-3ewx refactoring effort.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
